title: Live updates: Hillary Clinton says she ‘had no idea’ of Epstein’s criminal activities; US, Iran talk in Geneva
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: In New York, former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton will tell the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee in a closed-door deposition that she “had no idea” of the criminal activities of convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein and his associate, Ghislaine Maxwell, according to the opening statement she released Thursday morning. Her husband, former President…
